jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Ambrane - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Ambrane! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Ambrane:
Ambrane is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
